subcodes.first_line: The call hath been raised from the precincts of the Prison by the Lord of Names upon the luminous spot: "Verily, there is no God but Me, the All-Subduing." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع الندآء من شطر سجن مالک الاسماء علی البقعه النورآء انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @living waters; water of life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
